lead.description: The Philadelphia Fashion Incubator is a non-profit nurturing emerging fashion design entrepreneurs and start-ups to successfully run their small businesses. Impacting local economic development, the Incubator has successfully launched 50+ fashion brands in sustainability, gender-neutral, size inclusive, modest wear, among other apparel and accessory categories.
